description: Own an entity's hit points and death: seed hp, count an optional lifespan down, then emit a death event, tally a score key, and destroy. One of the four reuse-proof parts.

hp.description: Starting hit points (only if state.hp unset).

hpStateKey.description: Optional world.state key whose number, when set, seeds hp instead of the static hp param (cross-context carry-over).

lifespan.description: Seconds to live before dying of old age (0 = no limit).

tallyKey.description: Optional world.state key incremented on death.
